COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING TEMPORARY ORDERS: COURT IMPUTES INCOME TO FATHER IN THE AMOUNT OF $1500 PER MONTH AND FINDS MOTHER'S INCOME TO BE $10,077. COUNSEL SHALL CAL
CULATE SUPPORT BASED UPON THESE INCOME AMOUNTS, MOTHER'S HEALTH INSURANCE, $650 ADDITIONAL MEDICAL EXPENSE BY MOTHER, AND MOTHER GETTING THE
THREE MONTHS. FATHER SHALL NOTIFY MOTHER OF ANY SALES OF HIS ART OR ANY CHANGE IN HIS INCOME. $1000 ATTORNEY FEES SHALL BE PAYABLE TO FATHER BY
MOTHER; JURISDICTION IS RESERVED RE ADDITIONAL ATTORNEY FEES. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 9/5/00 AT 1:30 PM RE SPOUSAL SUPPORT REVIEW. (404-GRANT) DIANA PADILLA CSR 	975
